item.title: Avery Brewing: The Beast, Ep. 135
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
There are beers that are big, then there are BIG beers! This week we talk about one that is purely evil, we’re talking about The Beast from Avery Brewing . Pulled form their Demon Series of beers, The Beast is not for the faint of heart or weak of pallet, it’s full of aromas like […]

The post Avery Brewing: The Beast, Ep. 135 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Avery Brewing: duganA Double India Pale Ale, Ep. 116
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV, we’re taking on yet another beer from Avery Brewing, and when we say “taking on” that’s what we feel like every time we talk about there beers! Big on hoppy goodness, this Double IPA packs a serious punch . As they Avery describes it, it’s “A brutally bitter, dank, […]

The post Avery Brewing: duganA Double India Pale Ale, Ep. 116 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Interview with Adam Avery
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Adam Avery of the Avery Brewing Company talked to Beer America TV .

The post Interview with Adam Avery first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Episode 20 – Collaboration Not Litigation Ale
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Can’t we all just get along? Apparently we can, and the folks at Avery Brewing and Russian River Brewing prove it with their Collaboration Not Litigation Ale – it’s Salvation times 2!

The post Episode 20 – Collaboration Not Litigation Ale first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
